<strong>藥物資訊</strong>
<ul>
<li><strong>原適應症</strong>：Xalkori as monotherapy is indicated for:  The first line treatment of adults with anaplastic lymphoma kinase (ALK) positive advanced non small cell lung cancer (NSCLC) The treatment of adults with...</li>
<li><strong>證據等級</strong>：L5</li>
<li><strong>預測適應症</strong>（20 個）：<ul>
<li>fibromatosis, gingival（99.8%）</li>
<li>fibroma of lung（99.8%）</li>
<li>hamartoma of lung（99.8%）</li>
<li>lung hilum carcinoma（99.7%）</li>
<li>lung benign neoplasm（99.7%）</li>
<li>pulmonary sulcus neoplasm（99.7%）</li>
<li>lung germ cell tumor（99.7%）</li>
<li>inclusion body myopathy with early-onset Paget disease with or without frontotemporal dementia（99.7%）</li>
<li>junctional epidermolysis bullosa（99.7%）</li>
<li>Leukomelanoderma-infantilism-intellectual disability-hypodontia-hypotrichosis syndrome（99.7%）</li>
<li>ovarioleukodystrophy（99.6%）</li>
<li>lung cancer（99.6%）</li>
<li>junctional epidermolysis bullosa, non-Herlitz type（99.6%）</li>
<li>dehydratase deficiency（99.6%）</li>
<li>Ewing sarcoma（98.8%）</li>
<li>vertebral anomalies and variable endocrine and T-cell dysfunction（94.2%）</li>
<li>ganglioneuroblastoma (disease)（94.2%）</li>
<li>orbit sarcoma（92.8%）</li>
<li>synovial chondromatosis（92.8%）</li>
<li>retroperitoneal neoplasm（92.8%）</li>
</ul></li>
</ul>
